text.message: trading the ows guy a bit too freely here
red helps him a bit too much
hardly puts any dent to your devs
ill get stolen from regardless here
it would make more sense for you to go for the 3 4 11 to fight devs
you would also have all 5 resources
black u want roads to plow
cant expect much from the guy who blocks the 10 wood instead of the 9 ore
